event_description: A new tutor created an account.
A new parent created an account.
A tutor added a new student to their roster.
A tutor logged a completed tutoring session.
A tutor created a draft invoice.
A tutor sent an invoice to a parent.
An invoice was paid via Stripe checkout.
A tutor marked an invoice as paid manually.
A tutor started Stripe Connect onboarding.
A tutor sent a payment reminder email to a parent.
A parent submitted a session booking request.
A parent redeemed a student invite code to link their child.
